title: Helium
description: A lightweight fabric-based modpack designed to elevate your gaming experience and lighten the load on your computer.
body:
A **lightweight** fabric-based modpack designed to **elevate** your gaming experience and **lighten** the load on your computer. Basically, this is what I use when playing Minecraft and what I most enjoy playing with. If you have any suggestions, please send them to me. I'm very interested. --- ![Built on Adrenaline](https://wsrv.nl/?url=https%3A%2F%2Fcdn.jsdelivr.net%2Fnpm%2F%40intergrav%2Fdevins-badges%403%2Fassets%2Fcozy%2Fbuilt-with%2Fadrenaline_vector.svg&n=-1) --- (Below are the included modifications) ---
Performance mods
- BadOptimizations - Concurrent Chunk Management Engine - DashLoader - Distant Horizons - Dynamic FPS - EntityCulling - FastQuit - FerriteCore - ImmediatelyFast - Iris - LazyDFU - Lithium - More Culling - Noisium - Sodium - Starlight - Too Many Players - ThreadTweak - Indium
Utility and Beutification mods
- Ambient Sounds - Animated Mojang Logo - Animatica - Appleskin - Armor Chroma - Audioplayer - Automodpack - Beenfo - Chat Heads - Chunks Fade In - CIT Resewn - CleanCut - Clear Despawn - ClickThrough Plus - Continuity - CraftPresence - CustomSplash Screen - CustomWindowTitle - Debugify - Drip Sounds - Entity Model Features - Entity Texture Features - FabricSkyBoxes - Falling Leaves - FlightHelper - Fog Overrides - Foggy Pale Garden - Inspecio - Interactic - Jade - LambdaBetterGrass - LambDynamicLights - Make Bubbles Pop - MiniHUD - Mod Menu - Model Gap Fix - NotEnoughAnimations - Ok Zoomer - OptiGUI - Particle Rain - perspektive - Presence Footsteps - Presencium - Shulker Box Tooltip - Simple Voice Chat - Sound Physics Remastered - TelePistons - Tweakeroo - Vanilla Fireflies - Visuality - Voice Chat Interaction - Wakes - Who am I? - YOSBR
Libraries and other
- Architectury - Cloth Config - CreativeCore - Fabric Language Kotlin - libIPN - MaLiLib - MidnightLib - MixinTrace - owo - UniLib - Quilted Fabric API - YetAnotherConfigLib
Resource packs
- Improved Netherite - Ancient Debris Are Hard To See - 3D crops Revamped - Fresh Animations - (my) VanillaTweaks - xali's Potions - Less Obstructive Better Leaves
Shaders
- Complementary Reimagined
